name: Human
description: Versatile and adaptable, Humans form the backbone of the Southern Shores. Capable across all disciplines.

name: Glamredhel
description: Wild elves of the deep forests, fierce and unpredictable.

name: Aerian
description: A proud and ancient people with ties to the sky and open plains.

name: Eledhel
description: High elves of great grace and magical attunement. Slender and long-lived.

name: Vale Dwarf
description: Smaller cousins of the Mountain Dwarves, nimble and sharp-eyed.

name: Avian
description: Bird-like humanoids with hollow bones and keen sight. Swift but fragile.

name: Mountain Dwarf
description: Stocky and enduring, Mountain Dwarves are legendary warriors and craftsmen.

name: Orc
description: Powerful and fierce, Orcs are formidable in combat and deeply tribal.

name: Ogre
description: Massive and brutish, Ogres are rare player characters of extraordinary strength.

name: Fae
description: Mystical creatures of pure magical essence. Fragile but uniquely attuned to the weave.
